scenes.prompt: A young Indian boy with black spiky hair, yellow T-shirt with blue lightning bolt, blue shorts rides a small bicycle forward on a narrow mud road in an Indian village. Warm evening sunlight, small village houses with tiled roofs visible in background, flowering plants near doors. Side tracking camera, slightly low angle, smooth pedalling motion, clean 2D cartoon outlines, soft shading, stable character identity.

A young Indian boy with black spiky hair, yellow T-shirt with blue lightning bolt, blue shorts pedals his bicycle past small village houses with tiled roofs and flowering plants near the doors. A light breeze gently moves the trees. Warm evening sunlight, side tracking camera, smooth leg cycling motion, clean 2D cartoon outlines, consistent character proportions, no flicker.

A young Indian boy with black spiky hair, yellow T-shirt with blue lightning bolt, blue shorts slowly stops his bicycle near the gate of a small home at the end of a village road. The house has simple painted walls, a small veranda and a wooden door. Warm evening light, stable camera, smooth stopping motion, clean 2D cartoon style, consistent character face and outfit.

A young Indian boy with black spiky hair, yellow T-shirt with blue lightning bolt, blue shorts parks his bicycle against the wall near a house entrance then walks toward the wooden door. He gently pushes the door open and steps inside. Warm soft interior light visible through the doorway, smooth walking animation, clean 2D cartoon style, consistent proportions.

Inside a warmly lit Indian home interior. A young Indian boy with black spiky hair, yellow T-shirt with blue lightning bolt, blue shorts stands near the doorway with a surprised expression looking into the room. An elderly grandfather with bald head, white hair tufts on sides, white mustache, white short-sleeve shirt, khaki shorts sits on a wooden chair holding a mobile phone with a frustrated annoyed expression. Both characters clearly visible in the same frame. Soft indoor lighting, clean 2D cartoon outlines, stable composition.

Inside a warmly lit Indian home interior. Inside a warmly lit Indian home interior. Inside a warmly lit Indian home in the evening. A young Indian boy with black spiky hair, yellow T-shirt with blue lightning bolt, blue shorts smiles warmly while helping his elderly grandfather with the mobile phone, gently pointing at the screen. The elderly grandfather with bald head, white hair tufts on sides, white mustache, white short-sleeve shirt, khaki shorts looks at the phone with a relieved and grateful expression replacing his earlier frustration. Both characters sitting together, clearly visible in same frame. Warm golden evening light coming through a window, camera slightly zoomed out, clean 2D cartoon style, cinematic calm ending.
